details.reasoning: Implementation fully meets all rubric requirements: (1) Defines export_lora_to_onnx() function that saves LoRA A and B matrices via a wrapper _LoRADelta module; (2) Accepts save_directory path and opset_version parameter defaulting to 17; (3) Saves comprehensive metadata.json with rank, alpha, target_modules, opset_version, and per-layer shape/scaling info; (4) Exposes function via __all__ export and patches model class with save_pretrained_onnx() method using types.MethodType pattern; (5) Uses torch.onnx.export() with proper parameters including dynamic_axes, opset_version, and constant folding; (6) Code follows unsloth conventions with @torch.inference_mode() decorator, proper error handling, gc.collect() calls, 'Unsloth: ' print prefixes, comprehensive docstrings, and correct type hints. Handles edge cases like disabled adapters, module name sanitization, and peft_config detection.
